<script> document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var elements = document.querySelectorAll('.chart-container > .data-table-row');
  Array.from(elements).forEach(function(element) {
    var year = element.querySelector('td:nth-child(1)').textContent;
    var value = Number(element.querySelector('td:nth-child(2)').textContent.replace(',', ''));
    console.log({year: year, value: value});
  });
}); </script>
